title: Workflow — review existing post-mortem for quality and completeness
code_snippet:
# User provides an existing post-mortem document and says:
# 'Review this post-mortem. Is it good enough to publish?'
# Document has timeline, root cause, action items, but missing
# 'what went well' and action items lack JIRA tickets.
expected_feedback: Workflow: Review mode + Standard depth. Score against §8 scorecard. Findings: (1) Hygiene: 'what went well' section missing — add positive response patterns. (2) Hygiene: action items lack tracking tickets — link to JIRA/Linear. (3) Verify blameless language throughout. (4) Check 5-Why depth >= 3. (5) Confirm impact is quantified. Scorecard: likely Critical 3/3, Standard 4/5, Hygiene 2/4 = FAIL (hygiene).
